01222121120020100011110220210200101100000110 - ASI: 28

Rules:
  00 = 0 * 0
  01 = 0 * 1
  10 = 1 * 0
  11 = 1 * 1
  21 = 2 * 1
  22 = 2 * 2
  021 = 0 * 21
  200 = 2 * 00
  201 = 2 * 01
  211 = 2 * 11
  0001 = 00 * 01
  0122 = 01 * 22
  0200 = 0 * 200
  1022 = 10 * 22
  1100 = 11 * 00
  21211 = 21 * 211
  000110 = 0001 * 10
  000111 = 0001 * 11
  101100 = 10 * 1100
  200201 = 200 * 201
  0210200 = 021 * 0200
  012221211 = 0122 * 21211
  10220210200 = 1022 * 0210200
  101100000110 = 101100 * 000110
  200201000111 = 200201 * 000111
  012221211200201000111 = 012221211 * 200201000111
  10220210200101100000110 = 10220210200 * 101100000110
  01222121120020100011110220210200101100000110 = 012221211200201000111 * 10220210200101100000110
